name: Potatoes and Dandelions
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and clean the dandelions thoroughly.
2. Boil the potatoes in a large pan for about half an hour, depending on size.
3. Add the dandelions to the boiling water and continue cooking until both are tender.
4. Remove from water (water makes an excellent base for soups) and peel and mash the potatoes.
5. Cut the dandelions if they are large.
6. In a large skillet, sauté garlic and red pepper in olive oil for about a minute.
7. Add the mashed potatoes and dandelions to the skillet and cook for another minute.
8. Continue cooking with the potatoes and dandelions for another 15 minutes.
9. Enjoy with fresh crusty Italian bread and dry red wine. You may also use leftover mashed potatoes.
